title: Add post-auth cart merge handoff
verify: Post-auth handoff sends authenticated credentials and no destination/customer ID.
Successful merged/transferred/already_merged responses atomically switch to the backend-selected target before render.
Conflict, forbidden, in-progress, stale, and server failures retain a recoverable source reference.
A stale consumed-source tab clears ordinary CRUD state and can adopt the target only through authenticated replay.
T3 closure includes /verify PASS, per-task semantic-pass, human checkpoint, and rollback/recovery evidence.

verify.summary: Manual T3 functional verification passed. The required packet was ready and hash-matched before verification; linked FT-003 API/security/state/UX specs were read; fresh cart-merge tests, storefront typecheck, Memory Bank lint, strict doctor, and full storefront regression passed. The post-auth handoff sends credentials: include with an empty body and no destination/customer identity, validates backend-selected target responses before switching the reference, preserves source references on recoverable failures, and allows consumed-source target adoption only through authenticated replay. Task status remains unchanged; T3 closure still requires per-task /red-verify semantic-pass, HUMAN_CHECKPOINT: done, and ROLLBACK_RECOVERY_NOTE: present.

Per-task T3 adversarial semantic verification passed. TASK-024 solves the intended provider-agnostic post-auth merge handoff without client-selected destination/customer authority, OAuth/provider scope, backend merge semantics, browser-authoritative cart data, or source-reference loss on recoverable failures. Success adoption is tied to a validated backend-selected target, consumed-source target adoption remains authenticated-replay-only, and linked FT-003 API/security/state/UX contracts remain respected. T3 closure still requires explicit human checkpoint and rollback/recovery marker evidence before status can be done.

verify.closure_decision: Manual T3 closure explicitly requested by the user after /verify PASS and per-task /red-verify semantic-pass.
verify.summary: GENERAL closed TASK-024 in manual mode after explicit user instruction. Required T3 gates are satisfied: full protocol evidence, required packet/spec gates, /verify PASS, per-task /red-verify semantic-pass, HUMAN_CHECKPOINT: done, and ROLLBACK_RECOVERY_NOTE: present. FT-003 and REQ-008 remain planned because downstream acceptance tasks TASK-025 and TASK-026 are still not closed.

evidence_required: Credentials, request-shape, target-switch, and replay test output.
T3 human checkpoint and rollback/recovery note before closure.
constraints: Expose one provider-agnostic function for FT-004.
Use credentials: include for session-authenticated merge.
Switch the reference only from a validated successful backend response.
invariants: Client cannot choose destination or customer.
Failure cannot discard the source reference.
Replay cannot duplicate quantity or create another active target.
purpose: Provide the security-sensitive provider-agnostic handoff FT-004 invokes after authentication.
success_outcome: Successful authenticated merge atomically adopts the recorded target, while every failure remains recoverable.
anti_goals: Do not implement Google OAuth, VK ID, login UI, or callback routes.
Do not infer customer identity from browser state.
Do not clear the source before backend success.

forbidden_scope: checkout, order, inventory reservation, or payment
stop_conditions: Merge response cannot prove the backend-selected target.
Failure handling would discard or expose cart/customer state.
